sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the established template, self-audited before commit. Covers savoir vs connaître precision + the B2 knowledge family (ignorer as faux ami, être au courant de, être conscient de, méconnaître) + the talent/aptitude idiom bank (doué en/pour, la bosse des maths, l'oreille musicale, habile de ses mains, avoir des facilités en). Theme: school, formation. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego B2 (Hachette), Dossier 4 'Grandir' ('Connaissances et savoirs', p.60). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
